packageRules.description: uPortal runs JSR-286 (Portlet API 2.0). Portlet API 3.x (JSR-362) is a different container contract and is not supported.
This portlet is pinned to Spring Framework 3.2.x. Spring 4+ requires a coordinated migration; Spring 5+ needs Java 8+, Spring 6+ needs Jakarta EE + Java 17+.
This portlet predates the Hibernate 4+ line. Later majors require Spring 4+, Jakarta EE, or Java 17+.
The 2.x releases preserve the javax.xml.bind.* package namespace. 3+ moves to jakarta.xml.bind as part of Jakarta EE 9+.
plexus-archiver 4.10+ requires a newer commons-io than the one bundled with maven-war-plugin 3.4.0.
Mockito 5 uses the inline MockMaker by default; its bundled byte-buddy references ClassFileVersion.JAVA_V21, incompatible with the byte-buddy on this portlet's classpath.
